---
title: "Predictor Importance by Offence"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This chart compares variable importance from the tuned Random Forest and XGBoost models. Use the dropdown to switch across offence types.

```{python}
import pandas as pd
from shared_viz import build_importance_df, make_feature_importance_chart

# Assumed input files generated by EDA_Analysis_notebook or included in the repo:
# - data/rf_importance.csv: predictor importances from tuned random forest
# - data/xgb_importance.csv: predictor importances from tuned XGBoost

rf_importance_df = pd.read_csv("data/rf_importance.csv")
xgb_importance_df = pd.read_csv("data/xgb_importance.csv")

importance_df = build_importance_df(rf_importance_df, xgb_importance_df)
fig = make_feature_importance_chart(importance_df)
fig
```

**Caption.**  Interactive comparison of predictive model performance across offence types.
